photo_faq_items.q: Does the chibi keep my likeness?
photo_faq_items.a: Yes. The AI preserves key features like hair color, hairstyle, eye color, and accessories while applying the chibi art style.

photo_faq_items.q: What photo format should I upload?
photo_faq_items.a: JPG, PNG, or WebP. Keep the file under 5MB for fastest processing.
For best results, upload one person per photo. The AI focuses on the primary face detected in the image.
No. Your uploaded photo is processed and immediately discarded. We do not store or share your images.

photo.hero_badge: AI Photo to Chibi · Upload a Portrait or Selfie
photo.title: Photo to Chibi
photo.hero_subtitle: Turn any photo into an adorable chibi character in seconds. Upload a selfie, portrait, or full-body shot and watch AI transform it into cute anime-style chibi art — keeping your unique features while adding that signature oversized head, big eyes, and tiny body.
photo.photo_help: JPG, PNG, or WebP. A clear face shot under 5MB is recommended for fastest processing.
photo.notes_placeholder: Keep my hairstyle, add a pastel background, make the expression cheerful
photo.style_help: Portrait Chibi works best when you want to keep facial likeness.
photo.result_alt: AI generated photo to chibi character
photo.inspiration_desc: See what others created from photos
photo.step1_body: A clear face shot works best. Front-facing portraits with good lighting give the most accurate results.
photo.step2_body: Pick from Classic Chibi, Kawaii Soft, or Portrait Chibi depending on how stylized you want the result.
photo.step3_body: Want a specific outfit, background color, or expression? Add a short description to guide the AI.
photo.step4_body: Your chibi version is ready in seconds. Download it for use as an avatar, sticker, or gift.
photo.tips_title: What Makes a Good Source Photo
photo.tip1_body: The AI needs to see facial features to create an accurate chibi version.
photo.tip2_body: A cluttered background won't affect the chibi output, but a clean one helps the AI focus on your likeness.
photo.tip3_body: Natural light or well-lit indoor shots produce the best chibi transformations.
photo.tip4_body: Front-facing is ideal, but slight angles still produce great results.
